domains.name: Orchestration And Workflow
domains.definition: Assets whose primary value is controlling how work is sequenced, delegated, gated, reviewed, or completed.
exclude_rules: Domain-specific implementation skills whose workflow exists only to serve another primary domain
domains.boundary_test: Belongs here if the primary value is governing the work process itself, not mainly producing domain output like code, design, or marketing artifacts.

domains.name: Software Engineering
domains.definition: Assets whose primary value is producing, debugging, testing, reviewing, or improving software and code.
exclude_rules: Top-level workflow systems
domains.boundary_test: Belongs here if the primary value is better software output, not mainly workflow control.

domains.name: Design And UX
domains.definition: Assets whose primary value is visual quality, interaction quality, layout, taste, motion, accessibility, or design critique.
exclude_rules: General coding skills that only incidentally touch UI
domains.boundary_test: Belongs here if the primary value is better user experience or interface quality, not mainly implementation correctness.

domains.name: Marketing And Growth
domains.definition: Assets whose primary value is positioning, messaging, conversion, acquisition, retention, launch, pricing, GTM, or growth.
exclude_rules: General writing systems without explicit funnel or market logic
domains.boundary_test: Belongs here if the primary value is market, funnel, or growth impact, not just good writing.

domains.name: Writing, Voice, And Content
domains.definition: Assets whose primary value is authored language quality, editorial output, tone, channel adaptation, or voice calibration.
exclude_rules: Marketing systems whose main value is funnel strategy rather than authored voice
domains.boundary_test: Belongs here if the primary value is how the language sounds or communicates, not mainly funnel or market strategy.

domains.name: Research, Analysis, And Strategy
domains.definition: Assets whose primary value is gathering information, synthesizing evidence, comparing options, or producing strategic analysis.
exclude_rules: Execution-first systems with only a brief planning step
domains.boundary_test: Belongs here if the primary value is evidence synthesis or strategic comparison rather than direct execution.

domains.name: Operations, Automation, And Infrastructure
domains.definition: Assets whose primary value is setup, deployment, infra operations, environment management, automation, or operational reliability.
exclude_rules: Coding skills that only run tests or shell commands as part of development
domains.boundary_test: Belongs here if the primary value is operating or automating systems, not mainly producing application features.

domains.name: Data And Analytics
domains.definition: Assets whose primary value is event design, measurement, data analysis, reporting, or metrics interpretation.
exclude_rules: Marketing systems where analytics is only a supporting subskill
domains.boundary_test: Belongs here if the primary value is measurement and analytic interpretation, not mainly growth strategy or writing.

domains.name: Product And Business Strategy
domains.definition: Assets whose primary value is product scoping, roadmap reasoning, prioritization, pricing logic, or business model thinking.
exclude_rules: Workflow systems whose main value is orchestration rather than product reasoning
domains.boundary_test: Belongs here if the primary value is product or business direction, not mainly execution workflow or coding.

domains.name: Meta Skillcraft And Tooling
domains.definition: Assets whose primary value is creating, packaging, validating, transforming, or distributing other skills.
exclude_rules: Ordinary end-user skills
domains.boundary_test: Belongs here if the primary value is skill-system construction or maintenance, not direct end-user task execution.

function_modes.name: Plan
function_modes.definition: The asset primarily structures goals, tasks, scope, or next steps before execution.
exclude_rules: Pure execution without planning emphasis
function_modes.boundary_test: Belongs here if the primary action is deciding or structuring what to do, not directly doing it.

function_modes.name: Implement
function_modes.definition: The asset primarily creates, edits, or executes the target output directly.
exclude_rules: Pure review or planning assets
function_modes.boundary_test: Belongs here if the primary action is making the output itself.

function_modes.name: Review
function_modes.definition: The asset primarily evaluates an existing artifact for quality, issues, or improvement opportunities.
exclude_rules: Assets that only implement or plan
function_modes.boundary_test: Belongs here if the primary action is evaluative judgment on existing work.

function_modes.name: Verify
function_modes.definition: The asset primarily checks correctness, completion, or conformance against explicit criteria.
exclude_rules: General review without explicit validation
function_modes.boundary_test: Belongs here if the primary action is confirmation against criteria rather than broader critique.

function_modes.name: Audit
function_modes.definition: The asset primarily inspects a system or artifact against a framework to identify gaps and prioritized fixes.
exclude_rules: Simple review without a structured audit frame
function_modes.boundary_test: Belongs here if the primary action is structured gap analysis against a framework.

function_modes.name: Research
function_modes.definition: The asset primarily gathers, compares, or synthesizes information before decision or action.
exclude_rules: Execution-first systems with only brief context gathering
function_modes.boundary_test: Belongs here if the primary action is information acquisition or synthesis.

function_modes.name: Rewrite
function_modes.definition: The asset primarily transforms existing content into a new version with improved fit, tone, or quality.
include_rules: Adapts content to a new channel
exclude_rules: Pure first-draft generation
function_modes.boundary_test: Belongs here if the primary action is transforming existing material rather than creating from scratch.

function_modes.name: Orchestrate
function_modes.definition: The asset primarily routes, sequences, coordinates, or governs work across steps, tools, or agents.
exclude_rules: Single-purpose implementation skills
function_modes.boundary_test: Belongs here if the primary action is governing work flow rather than producing domain output directly.

function_modes.name: Template
function_modes.definition: The asset primarily provides a reusable structure to be filled, calibrated, or customized.
exclude_rules: Fully operational skills that do not depend on user calibration
function_modes.boundary_test: Belongs here if the primary action is scaffolding future work through a reusable structure.

function_modes.name: Package
function_modes.definition: The asset primarily builds, transforms, validates, or distributes skill systems or related tooling.
exclude_rules: End-user execution skills
function_modes.boundary_test: Belongs here if the primary action is preparing the skill system itself for use.

function_modes.name: Operate
function_modes.definition: The asset primarily manages runtime systems, deployments, environments, or operational procedures.
exclude_rules: Development-only implementation skills
function_modes.boundary_test: Belongs here if the primary action is running or maintaining systems in operation.
